file: SmrutiCortex quick-search 'github' keyword AI matches ranked high with 'repository' keyword match with green highlight Screenshot 2026-03-10 002321.png
alt: AI Search — 'github' query with AI-expanded 'repository' match in green

tour.title: Semantic Search
tour.subtitle: Find pages by meaning, not just keywords. Search "ML tutorials" and find "machine learning guides". Uses local embedding models.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search 'linkedin' keyword AI matches 'network' and 'site' in green highligh with top rank results Screenshot 2026-03-10 002723.png
alt: AI Search — 'linkedin' with 'network' and 'site' AI expansion

file: SmrutiCortex quick-serach 'docs' keyword gives AI improves match with 'documents' and 'files' matches Screenshot 2026-03-10 001334.png
alt: AI Search — 'docs' finding 'Documents' and 'files' via AI expansion

file: SmrutiCortex quick-serach 'google' keyword AI keywords matchs 'seach' and 'browser' in green highlight and top ranked Screenshot 2026-03-10 002500.png
alt: AI Search — 'google' with 'Search' and 'Browser' AI matches in green

file: SmrutiCortex quick-serach 'youtube' keyword AI matches 'video' keywords also in green highlighted with top rank Screenshot 2026-03-10 003004.png
alt: AI Search — 'youtube' with 'video' AI keyword match in green

tour.title: Match Highlighting
tour.subtitle: Matching text is highlighted in titles and URLs so you can see exactly why each result matched your query.

file: SmrutiCortex popup 'git smruti' keyword search yellow highlight best match results Screenshot 2026-03-03 124029.png
alt: Popup search with 'git smruti' keyword highlights and best match results

tour.title: Lightning Search
tour.subtitle: Results appear in under 50ms as you type. No loading spinners, no waiting.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search open default bookmarks listed along with some recent Screenshot 2026-03-03 123214.png
alt: Quick-search overlay with bookmarks and recent history

tour.title: Quick-Search Overlay
tour.subtitle: Press Ctrl+Shift+S on any webpage to search your history without leaving the page. Powered by Shadow DOM for zero style conflicts.

file: SmrutiCortex latest quick-serach 'git smruti' keyword search yellow highlight Screenshot 2026-03-03 123923.png
alt: Quick-search overlay with 'git smruti' keyword highlights

tour.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
tour.subtitle: Navigate results with arrow keys, open with Enter, copy links with Ctrl+C or Ctrl+M. Zero mouse needed.

file: SmrutiCortex old quick search opened default no results Screenshot 2026-02-03 000836.png
alt: Quick-search overlay showing keyboard shortcut bar

file: SmrutiCortex popup opened all bookmarks listed by default with recent Screenshot 2026-03-03 123606.png
alt: Popup showing bookmarks with star indicators and folder paths

tour.title: Bookmark Search
tour.subtitle: Search bookmarks alongside browser history. Bookmarks show a star indicator and folder path breadcrumbs.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings General Tab Screenshot 2026-03-02 204909.png
alt: General settings — display mode, sorting, result count, favicon and theme controls

tour.title: 35+ Settings
tour.subtitle: 6 settings tabs: General, Search, AI, Privacy, Data, Advanced. Customize every aspect of search behavior, display, and diagnostics.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings Search Tab Screenshot 2026-03-02 205823.png
alt: Search settings — Vivek Search scoring and match controls

tour.title: Vivek Search Scoring
tour.subtitle: 9-scorer ranking algorithm: recency, frequency, substring match, multi-token coverage, and more. Highlighted matches show exactly why each result ranked.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings AI Tab enable ai search with ollama endpoint models and enable semantic serach with ollama embedding model Screenshot 2026-03-02 204945.png
alt: AI settings — Ollama endpoint, model, semantic search and embedding configuration

tour.title: AI Search (Ollama)
tour.subtitle: Connect to your local Ollama instance for AI-powered keyword expansion. "war" becomes ["war", "battle", "combat"]. Entirely local, zero cloud calls.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings Privacy Tab Screenshot 2026-03-02 204959.png
alt: Privacy settings — sensitive URL blacklist and favicon loading controls

tour.title: Privacy Controls
tour.subtitle: Built-in sensitive URL blacklist covers banks, password managers, and payment sites. Add your own patterns. Toggle favicon loading for full privacy.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings Data tab Data Management indexing health indication Screenshot 2026-03-03 124703.png
alt: Data management — healthy index indicator, storage usage, manual indexing

tour.title: Data Management
tour.subtitle: Visual storage quota bar, one-click rebuild, reset settings, clear & rebuild, or full factory reset. You own your data.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings Advance tab Performance Monitor Statistics Screenshot 2026-03-03 124220.png
alt: Performance Monitor — search timing, memory usage, self-heals counter

tour.title: Performance Monitor
tour.subtitle: Real-time metrics: search count, average timing, min/max response, cache hit rate, memory usage, service worker health.

file: SmrutiCortex Settings Advanced Tab Screenshot 2026-03-02 205030.png
alt: Search Analytics — query history, debug mode, diagnostic export

tour.title: Search Analytics
tour.subtitle: Debug mode tracks every query. See top searches, query length distribution, scoring breakdowns. Export as JSON for bug reports.

file: SmrutiCortex settings page via popup html of extension in new tab Screenshot 2026-02-12 200431.png
alt: Settings page in full tab view showing display mode options

tour.title: Display Modes
tour.subtitle: Switch between compact list view and horizontal card view. Full tab mode for when you want the widest search experience.

file: SmrutiCortex extension page popup in action with keywords 'git smruti' Screenshot 2026-02-12 200635.png
alt: Extension popup with search results for 'git smruti'

tour.title: Omnibox Search
tour.subtitle: Type "sc " in the address bar for quick search without even opening the extension. Results appear right in the browser suggestions.

file: SmrutiCortex quick serach in action with keywords 'smruti git' Screenshot 2026-02-12 200309.png
alt: Quick-search overlay showing Vivek Search scoring in action

file: SmrutiCortex popup onboarding 1 Search Screenshot 2026-03-23 023240.png
alt: Popup onboarding tour — search input highlighted with tooltip

tour.title: Popup Tour: Search
tour.subtitle: The in-extension tour highlights each feature. Type anything in the search bar — results appear instantly as you type.

file: SmrutiCortex popup onboarding 2 Sort Results Screenshot 2026-03-23 023356.png
alt: Popup onboarding tour — sort dropdown highlighted with tooltip

tour.title: Popup Tour: Sort
tour.subtitle: Switch between Best Match, Most Recent, Most Visited, or Alphabetical sorting with the dropdown.

file: SmrutiCortex popup onboarding 3 AI Status Screenshot 2026-03-23 023703.png
alt: Popup onboarding tour — AI status bar tooltip shown centered (AI not active)

tour.title: Popup Tour: AI Status
tour.subtitle: When Ollama AI is enabled, a status bar appears showing search sources: Keyword, AI Cache, or AI Live.

file: SmrutiCortex popup onboarding 4 Settings Screenshot 2026-03-23 023812.png
alt: Popup onboarding tour — settings gear button highlighted

tour.title: Popup Tour: Settings
tour.subtitle: Access all configuration: theme, search options, AI config, privacy controls, data management, and more.

file: SmrutiCortex popup onboarding 5 Keyboard Shortcuts Screenshot 2026-03-23 023853.png
alt: Popup onboarding tour — keyboard shortcuts footer highlighted

tour.title: Popup Tour: Shortcuts
tour.subtitle: Enter opens in new tab. Ctrl+Shift+S opens the quick-search overlay. Type "sc " in the address bar for omnibox access.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search onboarding 1 Serach Screenshot 2026-03-23 024224.png
alt: Quick-search onboarding tour — search input highlighted with tooltip

tour.title: Quick-Search Tour: Search
tour.subtitle: Press Ctrl+Shift+S on any page. Type to search your browsing history without leaving the current page.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search onboarding 2 Sort Screenshot 2026-03-23 025513.png
alt: Quick-search onboarding tour — sort button highlighted with tooltip

tour.title: Quick-Search Tour: Sort
tour.subtitle: Click the sort button to switch between Best Match, Most Recent, Most Visited, or Alphabetical results.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search onboarding 3 AI Status Screenshot 2026-03-23 024320.png
alt: Quick-search onboarding tour — AI status tooltip shown below overlay

tour.title: Quick-Search Tour: AI Status
tour.subtitle: When Ollama AI is enabled, search source badges appear: Keyword [LEXICAL], AI Cache [ENGRAM], or AI Live [NEURAL].

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search onboarding 4 Keyboard Shortcuts Screenshot 2026-03-23 024506.png
alt: Quick-search onboarding tour — keyboard shortcuts footer bar highlighted

tour.title: Quick-Search Tour: Shortcuts
tour.subtitle: Enter opens in new tab. Shift+Enter opens in background. Arrow keys navigate results. Esc closes the overlay.

file: SmrutiCortex quick-search onboarding 5 Help Screenshot 2026-03-23 030851.png
alt: Quick-search onboarding tour — help button highlighted with tooltip

tour.title: Quick-Search Tour: Help
tour.subtitle: Click the "?" button anytime to replay the feature tour. Press Ctrl+Shift+S to open or close the overlay.
